title: Thunderstorm's Armor
description: This Mod adds copper tools and armor - Watch out for thunderstorms
body:
![Thunderstorm's Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da90a198036e7f0ae6f53ed362afc5278ed49e16.png)
# Thunderstorm's Armor

## Description:
Experience the electrifying thrill of the Thunderstorm's Armor mod, where the skies crackle with power and danger looms with every thunderclap. In this immersive addition to your Minecraft world, the once serene weather patterns become a force to be reckoned with as storms bring forth both peril and opportunity.

## Features:

1. **Copper Armor Set:** Equip yourself with the new Copper Armor set, crafted from the finest ores. This unique armor not only provides protection but also attracts the attention of lightning during thunderstorms.

2. **Dynamic Lightning Strikes:** Beware the skies as lightning bolts strike with unpredictable ferocity. When wearing the Thunderstorm's Copper Armor during a thunderstorm, you become a magnet for lightning strikes, offering both risk and reward.

3. **Strategic Gameplay:** Plan your adventures carefully, for venturing out during thunderstorms carries perilous dangers. Whether seeking the thrill of dodging lightning or harnessing its power, every journey becomes an adrenaline-fueled escapade.

### Are you ready to embrace the power of the storm? Install Thunderstorm's Armor today and embark on an electrifying journey unlike any other in Minecraft!
